overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a gritty urban slum environment with burning debris and abandoned vehicles. The scene features golden hour lighting with long shadows cast across concrete barriers and graffiti-covered walls, transitioning from a narrow alley to an open street with a burning car wreck.

events.description: female NPC with green hair and cybernetic arm passes close to camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow path beside red and white striped concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: woman with green hair and blue crop top walking toward camera
group of pedestrians walking in the distance along the path

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete security barriers lining the left side of the path
concrete retaining wall with large American flag murals and political graffiti
multi-story concrete residential buildings built into the hillside with balconies

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow urban alley flanked by red and white security barriers on the left and hillside apartment buildings on the right. A woman with distinctive green hair passes by closely, while American flag graffiti murals are visible on the wall ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled street corner with burning debris

events.description: burning trash pile comes into view around the corner, emitting smoke and flames
male NPC in orange vest passes very close to camera, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: moving past the burning trash pile and deeper into the open street area

notable_agents.action: man wearing orange safety vest and white pants walking past camera

entered.detail: large pile of garbage bags and debris engulfed in flames with thick smoke
scattered piles of blue and green plastic trash bags stacked on the street
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The player rounds the corner into a wider street area where a large trash pile burns fiercely. A man in an orange vest passes close by as the camera navigates around the fire, revealing garbage-strewn asphalt and graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned street with burning vehicle wreck

events.description: camera turns toward and approaches the burning blue car wreck
begins circling around the burning car to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the burning wrecked car, examining the flames and damage from multiple sides

entered.detail: wrecked blue sedan with open doors and missing wheels, engulfed in flames

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and circles a burning blue car wreck in the middle of the abandoned street. The camera moves clockwise around the vehicle, showing the open doors and intense flames, while the surrounding graffiti walls and hillside apartments shift in perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined urban alleyway into a wider, chaotic street dominated by fire and wreckage. It begins by navigating a narrow passage flanked by security barriers and hillside apartments, passing a woman with green hair and American flag graffiti. As the camera rounds a corner, the space opens into a broader street where the view shifts toward a fiercely burning trash pile and a passing man in an orange vest. The scene then expands further as the camera approaches a burning blue car wreck, circling the vehicle clockwise to reveal its open doors and intense flames. This movement concludes with a shifting perspective of the surrounding graffiti-covered walls and distant apartments under the golden light.
